productName: Melted Diamond Badder - Jet Fuel Gelato - 1g
description: This hybrid badder turns Jet Fuel Gelato into glossy, gooey gold: whipped to a soft, spreadable consistency packed with flavor and easy to work with. Creamy, terpy, and easy to handle — with notes of ammonia, violet, and flowery, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
